tasks.subject: Task 1: Build + layout plumbing (interactive gating + theme event)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `interactive: true` front-matter gates kit includes; theme toggle dispatches `themechange`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["build.py", "templates/_layout.html.j2", "content/_smoke-interactive.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 build.py && grep -q 'demo-kit/kit.js' dist/_smoke-interactive/index.html && ! grep -q 'demo-kit/kit.js' dist/index.html && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["interactive:true page emits kit.js", "non-interactive omits it", "toggle dispatches themechange"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: theme.js — token reader + change fan-out
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read CSS tokens; fan out themechange.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["static/demo-kit/theme.js", "tests/manual/theme.html"], "verifyCommand": "served manual harness", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Theme.tokens() returns 7 tokens", "Theme.onChange fires + returns unsubscribe"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: sim.js — integrators (TDD) + Anim + CanvasDraw
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure integrate(euler|rk4) + Anim loop + CanvasDraw.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["static/demo-kit/sim.js", "tests/integrate.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "node --test tests/integrate.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rk4 <1e-6 on x'=-x", "rk4 beats euler", "energy drift <1%", "no autoplay under reduced-motion"]}
```
